purpose: Replace a workpaper's content in place (native 'Upload new version') — overwrites the same documentId with a new version. Distinct from the ADD-file POST /v1/Documents/{clientId} and from the soft-delete->evict->claim default replace.
transport: in-page XHR (engagement->WPM cross-origin; fetch fails CORS). Embed file as base64 Blob/File so bytes never cross the tool channel (validated bridge pattern).
body: multipart/form-data, single field 'file' = the File (named to MATCH the current display name).

name_match_rule.rule: The uploaded file's BASE name must equal the workpaper's CURRENT DISPLAY NAME (not the original upload name, not derivable from the stored blob which is crypto-gibberish).
name_match_rule.fail_body: {"errors":[{"message":"File name does not match existing workpaper name.","exceptionType":"System.ArgumentException"}],"message":"The request data is invalid."}
evidence: original name after display rename (blank-wp-2001.xlsx vs display blank-wp-2001 1) -> 400 [proves CURRENT display, not original]
name_match_rule.extension_note: Display name carries no extension; the file does. Success matched base 'blank-wp-2001 1' to display 'blank-wp-2001 1' with the file as '.xlsx' — so match is on base name; keep the file's real extension.

prereq: Read the current display name from WPM metadata first (wpm.folder_get on the workpaper's folder -> row.name for the documentId). Build the upload File with that exact base name.
no_hard_delete: This is an OVERWRITE (in-place new version), NOT a delete — fires no DELETE call (not the Kymera hazard). It is destructive-in-spirit (prior content survives only in CCH version history). file-io.md's DEFAULT remains soft-delete->evict->claim; offer this native path explicitly when the user wants a true in-place version.
validated_on: 2026-06-19 Coop / Axcess Blind Test 03 (client 100930, eng 393137, documentId 4097135) — 2 fail states + 1 success captured live.
